description.en: Assign a Python function or another callable to this attribute. The callable will be called with three or more arguments: callable(result, func, arguments) result is what the foreign function returns, as specified by the restype attribute. func is the foreign function object itself, this allows reusing the same callable object to check or post process the results of several functions. arguments is a tuple containing the parameters originally passed to the function call, this allows specializi...
